attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
ROL_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRI_KEY
,SK_TRX_DISTRI_ID_INT
,SK_AE_HEADER_ID_INT
,SK_AE_LINE_NUM_INT
,SK_TRX_ID_INT
,AR_TRX_KEY
,AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
,BILL_TO_CUST_PRTY_KEY
,GL_DT
,BK_TRXL_ISO_CURR_CD
,BK_FUNCTIONAL_ISO_CURR_CD
,ACCT_CLASS_CD
,SALES_ORDER_KEY
,SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
,PRDT_INVOICED_QTY
,REV_DISTRI_TYPE_CD
,GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCT_KEY
,BK_COMPANY_CD
,SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY
,SK_PREVIOUS_TRX_ID_INT
,CREDIT_DEBIT_TYPE
,GL_POSTED_DT
,PRODUCT_KEY
,BK_DEAL_ID
,MANUAL_REV_TRANSFER_TYPE_CD
,TRANSFER_GROUP_TYPE_CD
,SBSCRPTN_ITEM_CHANGE_ID_INT
,ELEMENT_TYPE_CD
,BK_APPLICATION_ID_INT
,BILL_TO_ERP_CA_LOC_USE_KEY
,TRX_SRC_CD
,OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT
,ATTRIBUTION_CD
,COALESCE(BK_WEB_ORDER_ID,'UNKNOWN')
,SS_CD
,ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD
,RU_TRXL_CREDIT_AMT
,RU_FUNCTIONAL_CREDIT_AMT
,RU_TRXL_DEBIT_AMT
,RU_FUNCTIONAL_DEBIT_AMT
,BK_POS_TRX_ID_INT
,COALESCE (BK_FISCAL_CAL_CD,'UNKNOWN') BK_FISCAL_CAL_CD
, COALESCE(BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUM_INT, -999) AS BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUM_INT
,COALESCE (BK_FISCAL_MTH_NUM_INT,-999)BK_FISCAL_MTH_NUM_INT
,CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DTM
,USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER
,CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_UPDATE_DTM
,USER AS EDW_UPDATE_USER
,REBATE_PROGRAM_NAME
,POB_TYPE_CD
,COALESCE(SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,-999)
,COALESCE(SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,-999)
,'I' AS ACTION_CODE
, DML_TYPE
,COALESCE(ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME,'UNKNOWN')
,COALESCE(RULE_START_DATE,CAST('3500-01-01' AS DATE))
,COALESCE(RULE_END_DATE,CAST('3500-01-01' AS DATE))
,SUBSCRIPTION_CD
,SUBSCRIPTION_REF_ID
FROM (
SELECT
SMROL.ROL_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRI_KEY,
COALESCE (DIST.TRANSACTION_DIST_ID, -999)  AS SK_TRX_DISTRI_ID_INT,
COALESCE (DIST.AE_HEADER_ID , -999 )SK_AE_HEADER_ID_INT,
COALESCE( DIST.AE_LINE_NUM,  -999)  SK_AE_LINE_NUM_INT,
COALESCE( DIST.TRANSACTION_ID, -999) AS SK_TRX_ID_INT,
COALESCE (NAT.AR_TRX_KEY , -7777) AS AR_TRX_KEY,
COALESCE (NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY ,-7777)  AS AR_TRX_LINE_KEY,
COALESCE(INV.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,-999) BILL_TO_CUST_PRTY_KEY,
COALESCE (XAH.ACCOUNTING_DATE , DATE '3500-01-01') AS  GL_DT,
COALESCE (DIST.CURRENCY_CODE , 'UNK') AS BK_TRXL_ISO_CURR_CD,
COALESCE (NSOB.FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE , 'UNK') AS BK_FUNCTIONAL_ISO_CURR_CD,
COALESCE (DIST.ACCOUNT_CLASS , 'UNKNOWN' )AS ACCT_CLASS_CD,
Coalesce ( NSOVT.SALES_ORDER_KEY,NSOLX.SALES_ORDER_KEY, -7777) AS SALES_ORDER_KEY ,
Coalesce ( NSOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,NATL.RU_EXAAS_SUBSCRIPTION_SOL_KEY ,-7777) AS SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY ,
-999 AS PRDT_INVOICED_QTY,
COALESCE (DIST.DIST_TYPE, 'UNKNOWN') AS REV_DISTRI_TYPE_CD,
COALESCE(ENGLA.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY,-995) AS GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCT_KEY ,
COALESCE (EOUGC.BK_COMPANY_CODE, 'UNK') AS BK_COMPANY_CD,
COALESCE (NSOB.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY,-999) SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY,
-999  AS SK_PREVIOUS_TRX_ID_INT,
CASE WHEN DIST.DIST_BAL_TYPE='C' THEN 'CREDIT' WHEN DIST.DIST_BAL_TYPE='D' THEN
'DEBIT'  ELSE  'UNKNOWN'END AS CREDIT_DEBIT_TYPE,
COALESCE(XAH.GL_TRANSFER_DATE,DATE '3500-01-01') GL_POSTED_DT,
COALESCE (NP.ITEM_KEY,  -999) AS PRODUCT_KEY,
'UNKNOWN' AS BK_DEAL_ID,
'UNKNOWN' AS  MANUAL_REV_TRANSFER_TYPE_CD,
'UNKNOWN' AS TRANSFER_GROUP_TYPE_CD ,
COALESCE(EXT_ALL.ATTRIBUTE16,-999) AS  SBSCRPTN_ITEM_CHANGE_ID_INT,
COALESCE ( DIST.ELEMENT_TYPE,'UNKNOWN' ) ELEMENT_TYPE_CD,
COALESCE (DIST.APPLICATION_ID, -999) AS  BK_APPLICATION_ID_INT,
-999  AS BILL_TO_ERP_CA_LOC_USE_KEY,
'NA_ADJ' AS TRX_SRC_CD,
-9999 AS OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT,
'STANDALONE' AS  ATTRIBUTION_CD,
EXT_ALL.ATTRIBUTE15 AS BK_WEB_ORDER_ID,
'CG' AS SS_CD,
/* CASE added as a part of Nov14 ATHENA Release*/
--CASE WHEN NP.IS_THIRD_PARTY_OFFER_FLG='Y' THEN 'FSUB Net Accounting'
CASE WHEN NP.IS_THIRD_PARTY_OFFER_FLG='Y' THEN 'Cisco Plus Net Accounting'
ELSE
'Net Accounting Adjustment Auto' 
END  ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD,
CASE WHEN DIST.DIST_BAL_TYPE='C' THEN DIST.AMOUNT ELSE 0 END AS RU_TRXL_CREDIT_AMT,
CASE WHEN DIST.DIST_BAL_TYPE='C' THEN DIST.ACCOUNTED_AMOUNT ELSE 0 END  AS RU_FUNCTIONAL_CREDIT_AMT,
CASE WHEN DIST.DIST_BAL_TYPE='D' THEN DIST.AMOUNT ELSE 0 END AS RU_TRXL_DEBIT_AMT,
CASE WHEN DIST.DIST_BAL_TYPE='D' THEN DIST.ACCOUNTED_AMOUNT ELSE 0 END AS  RU_FUNCTIONAL_DEBIT_AMT,
COALESCE(EXT_ALL.NUM_ATTRIBUTE53,-999) AS  BK_POS_TRX_ID_INT,
NFISMN.BK_FISCAL_CALENDAR_CODE  BK_FISCAL_CAL_CD   ,
NFISMN.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT   BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUM_INT  ,
NFISMN.BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT  BK_FISCAL_MTH_NUM_INT  ,
-999 AS REBATE_PROGRAM_NAME,
'UNKNOWN' AS  POB_TYPE_CD,
INV.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
INV.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
CASE WHEN NROL.ROL_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRI_KEY IS NULL THEN 'I' ELSE 'U' END AS DML_TYPE,
EXT_ALL.ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME,
EXT_ALL.RULE_START_DATE,
EXT_ALL.RULE_END_DATE,
COALESCE ( NSOLX.BK_SUBSCRIPTION_ID, 'UNKNOWN') SUBSCRIPTION_CD,
COALESCE(EXT_ALL.ATTRIBUTE9,'UNKNOWN') AS  SUBSCRIPTION_REF_ID
FROM
$$STGDB.ST_CG_XXCFIR_REVENUE_DIST_ALL   DIST
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_ROL_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRI SMROL
ON SMROL.SK_TRX_DISTRI_ID_INT = DIST.TRANSACTION_DIST_ID
INNER JOIN  $$ETLVWDB.EL_XXCFIR_REV_EXTRACT_NA EXT_ALL
ON DIST.TRANSACTION_ID=EXT_ALL.TRANSACTION_ID
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_XLA_AE_HEADERS_AR  XAH
ON DIST.AE_HEADER_ID=XAH.AE_HEADER_ID
AND  DIST.APPLICATION_ID=XAH.APPLICATION_ID
AND   XAH.BALANCE_TYPE_CODE = 'A'
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP
ON EXT_ALL.SKU =NP.BK_PRODUCT_ID
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EV_OP_UNIT_GAAP_COMPANY EOUGC
ON(EOUGC.SET_OF_BOOKS_ID_INT = DIST.LEDGER_ID)
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_SET_OF_BOOKS NSOB
ON NSOB.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = EOUGC.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY
LEFT JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_TRX_LINE SATL
ON (SATL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT = COALESCE (EXT_ALL.TRX_LINE_ID, -9999)
AND SATL.SS_CODE = 'CG')
AND SATL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT >0
LEFT JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL
ON NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = SATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
AND NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY>0
LEFT JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX NAT
ON NAT.AR_TRX_KEY = NATL.AR_TRX_KEY
AND NAT.AR_TRX_KEY>0
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_FISCAL_MONTH NFISMN
ON ( CAST(XAH.ACCOUNTING_DATE AS DATE) >= NFISMN.FISCAL_MONTH_START_DATE
AND CAST(XAH.ACCOUNTING_DATE AS DATE) <= NFISMN.FISCAL_MONTH_END_DATE)
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER NSO
ON( (EXT_ALL.ORDER_NUMBER) = NSO.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT)
AND NSO.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT>0
AND NSO.SS_CODE IN 'CG'
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER NSOVT
ON NSOVT.SALES_ORDER_KEY = NSO.SALES_ORDER_KEY
AND NSO.SALES_ORDER_KEY>0
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE NSOL
ON NSOL.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT = EXT_ALL.ORDER_LINE_ID
AND NSOL.SS_CODE = 'CG'
AND  NSOL.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT>0
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE NSOLX
ON NSOLX.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY = NATL.RU_EXAAS_SUBSCRIPTION_SOL_KEY
AND NSOLX.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY>0
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EV_N_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT  ENGLA
ON (ENGLA.CODE_COMBINATION_ID = DIST.CCID
AND ENGLA.GLOBAL_NAME='CG')
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_ROL_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRI NROL
ON NROL.ROL_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRI_KEY=SMROL.ROL_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRI_KEY
AND BK_APPLICATION_ID_INT =20368
LEFT JOIN (SELECT
BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY  , 
REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD        
FROM 
$$FINLGLVWDB.N_INV_REV_MEASURE ,
$$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR 
WHERE REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD IN ('AR','POS')
AND DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT =FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT
AND FISCAL_MONTH_AGE IN (1,0,-1))INV
ON INV.REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY=EXT_ALL.ATTRIBUTE7
AND INV.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD=EXT_ALL.ATTRIBUTE4

UNION ALL

SELECT
SMROL.ROL_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRI_KEY,
COALESCE (DIST.TRANSACTION_DIST_ID, -999)  AS SK_TRX_DISTRI_ID_INT,
COALESCE (DIST.AE_HEADER_ID , -999 )SK_AE_HEADER_ID_INT,
COALESCE( DIST.AE_LINE_NUM,  -999)  SK_AE_LINE_NUM_INT,
COALESCE( DIST.TRANSACTION_ID, -999) AS SK_TRX_ID_INT,
COALESCE (NAT.AR_TRX_KEY , -7777) AS AR_TRX_KEY,
COALESCE (NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY ,-7777)  AS AR_TRX_LINE_KEY,
COALESCE(INV.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,-999) BILL_TO_CUST_PRTY_KEY,
COALESCE (XAH.ACCOUNTING_DATE , DATE '3500-01-01') AS  GL_DT,
COALESCE (DIST.CURRENCY_CODE , 'UNK') AS BK_TRXL_ISO_CURR_CD,
COALESCE (NSOB.FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE , 'UNK') AS BK_FUNCTIONAL_ISO_CURR_CD,
COALESCE (DIST.ACCOUNT_CLASS , 'UNKNOWN' )AS ACCT_CLASS_CD,
Coalesce ( NSOVT.SALES_ORDER_KEY,NSOLX.SALES_ORDER_KEY, -7777) AS SALES_ORDER_KEY ,
Coalesce ( NSOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,NATL.RU_EXAAS_SUBSCRIPTION_SOL_KEY ,-7777) AS SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY ,
-999 AS PRDT_INVOICED_QTY,
COALESCE (DIST.DIST_TYPE, 'UNKNOWN') AS REV_DISTRI_TYPE_CD,
COALESCE(ENGLA.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY,-995) AS GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCT_KEY ,
COALESCE (EOUGC.BK_COMPANY_CODE, 'UNK') AS BK_COMPANY_CD,
COALESCE (NSOB.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY,-999) SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY,
-999  AS SK_PREVIOUS_TRX_ID_INT,
CASE WHEN DIST.DIST_BAL_TYPE='C' THEN 'CREDIT' WHEN DIST.DIST_BAL_TYPE='D' THEN
'DEBIT'  ELSE  'UNKNOWN' END AS CREDIT_DEBIT_TYPE,
COALESCE(XAH.GL_TRANSFER_DATE,DATE '3500-01-01') GL_POSTED_DT,
COALESCE (NP.ITEM_KEY,  -999) AS  PRODUCT_KEY,
'UNKNOWN' AS BK_DEAL_ID,
'UNKNOWN' AS  MANUAL_REV_TRANSFER_TYPE_CD,
'UNKNOWN' AS TRANSFER_GROUP_TYPE_CD ,
COALESCE(EXT_ALL.ATTRIBUTE16,-999) AS  SBSCRPTN_ITEM_CHANGE_ID_INT,
COALESCE ( DIST.ELEMENT_TYPE,'UNKNOWN' ) ELEMENT_TYPE_CD,
COALESCE (DIST.APPLICATION_ID, -999) AS  BK_APPLICATION_ID_INT,
-999  AS BILL_TO_ERP_CA_LOC_USE_KEY,
'NA_ADJ' AS TRX_SRC_CD,
-9999 AS OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT,
'STANDALONE' AS  ATTRIBUTION_CD,
EXT_ALL.ATTRIBUTE15 AS BK_WEB_ORDER_ID,
'CG' AS SS_CD,
/* CASE added as a part of Nov14 ATHENA Release*/
--CASE WHEN NP.IS_THIRD_PARTY_OFFER_FLG='Y' THEN 'FSUB Net Accounting'
CASE WHEN NP.IS_THIRD_PARTY_OFFER_FLG='Y' THEN 'Cisco Plus Net Accounting'
ELSE
'Net Accounting Adjustment Auto' 
END  ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD,
CASE WHEN DIST.DIST_BAL_TYPE='C' THEN DIST.AMOUNT ELSE 0 END AS RU_TRXL_CREDIT_AMT,
CASE WHEN DIST.DIST_BAL_TYPE='C' THEN DIST.ACCOUNTED_AMOUNT ELSE 0 END AS RU_FUNCTIONAL_CREDIT_AMT,
CASE WHEN DIST.DIST_BAL_TYPE='D' THEN DIST.AMOUNT ELSE 0 END AS RU_TRXL_DEBIT_AMT,
CASE WHEN DIST.DIST_BAL_TYPE='D' THEN DIST.ACCOUNTED_AMOUNT ELSE 0 END AS RU_FUNCTIONAL_DEBIT_AMT,
COALESCE(EXT_ALL.NUM_ATTRIBUTE53,-999) AS BK_POS_TRX_ID_INT,
NFISMN.BK_FISCAL_CALENDAR_CODE  BK_FISCAL_CAL_CD   ,
NFISMN.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT   BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUM_INT  ,
NFISMN.BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT  BK_FISCAL_MTH_NUM_INT  ,
-999 AS REBATE_PROGRAM_NAME,
'UNKNOWN' AS  POB_TYPE_CD,
INV.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
INV.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
CASE WHEN NROL.ROL_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRI_KEY IS NULL THEN 'I' ELSE 'U' END AS DML_TYPE,
EXT_ALL.ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME,
EXT_ALL.RULE_START_DATE,
EXT_ALL.RULE_END_DATE,
COALESCE ( NSOLX.BK_SUBSCRIPTION_ID, 'UNKNOWN') SUBSCRIPTION_CD,
COALESCE(EXT_ALL.ATTRIBUTE9,'UNKNOWN') AS  SUBSCRIPTION_REF_ID
FROM
$$EXCEPDB.EX_CG_XXCFIR_REVENUE_DIST_NA   DIST
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_ROL_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRI SMROL
ON SMROL.SK_TRX_DISTRI_ID_INT = DIST.TRANSACTION_DIST_ID
INNER JOIN  $$ETLVWDB.EL_XXCFIR_REV_EXTRACT_NA EXT_ALL
ON DIST.TRANSACTION_ID=EXT_ALL.TRANSACTION_ID
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_XLA_AE_HEADERS_AR  XAH
ON DIST.AE_HEADER_ID=XAH.AE_HEADER_ID
AND  DIST.APPLICATION_ID=XAH.APPLICATION_ID
AND   XAH.BALANCE_TYPE_CODE = 'A'
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP
ON EXT_ALL.SKU = NP.BK_PRODUCT_ID
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EV_OP_UNIT_GAAP_COMPANY EOUGC
ON(EOUGC.SET_OF_BOOKS_ID_INT = DIST.LEDGER_ID)
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_SET_OF_BOOKS NSOB
ON NSOB.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = EOUGC.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY
LEFT JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_TRX_LINE SATL
ON (SATL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT = COALESCE (EXT_ALL.TRX_LINE_ID, -9999)
AND SATL.SS_CODE = 'CG')
AND SATL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT >0
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL
ON NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = SATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
AND NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY>0
LEFT JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX NAT
ON NAT.AR_TRX_KEY = NATL.AR_TRX_KEY
AND NAT.AR_TRX_KEY>0
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_FISCAL_MONTH NFISMN
ON ( CAST(XAH.ACCOUNTING_DATE AS DATE) >= NFISMN.FISCAL_MONTH_START_DATE
AND CAST(XAH.ACCOUNTING_DATE AS DATE) <= NFISMN.FISCAL_MONTH_END_DATE)
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER NSO
ON( (EXT_ALL.ORDER_NUMBER) = NSO.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT)
AND NSO.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT>0
AND NSO.SS_CODE IN 'CG'
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER NSOVT
ON NSOVT.SALES_ORDER_KEY = NSO.SALES_ORDER_KEY	 
AND NSO.SALES_ORDER_KEY>0
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE NSOL
ON NSOL.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT = EXT_ALL.ORDER_LINE_ID
AND NSOL.SS_CODE = 'CG'
AND  NSOL.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT>0
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE NSOLX
ON NSOLX.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY = NATL.RU_EXAAS_SUBSCRIPTION_SOL_KEY
AND NSOLX.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY>0
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EV_N_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT  ENGLA
ON (ENGLA.CODE_COMBINATION_ID = DIST.CCID
AND ENGLA.GLOBAL_NAME='CG')
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_ROL_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRI NROL
ON NROL.ROL_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRI_KEY=SMROL.ROL_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRI_KEY
AND BK_APPLICATION_ID_INT =20368
LEFT JOIN (SELECT
BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY  , 
REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD        
FROM 
$$FINLGLVWDB.N_INV_REV_MEASURE ,
$$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR 
WHERE REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD IN ('AR','POS')
AND DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT =FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT
AND FISCAL_MONTH_AGE IN (1,0,-1))INV
ON INV.REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY=EXT_ALL.ATTRIBUTE7
AND INV.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD=EXT_ALL.ATTRIBUTE4
) A

SELECT 
TRANSACTION_DIST_ID     
 ,APPLICATION_NAME        
 ,APPLICATION_ID          
 ,LEDGER_ID               
 ,ORG_ID                  
 ,EVENT_ID                
 ,EVENT_TYPE              
 ,EVENT_STATUS            
 ,AE_HEADER_ID            
 ,AE_LINE_NUM             
 ,TRANSACTION_ID          
 ,TRX_NUMBER              
 ,TRX_LINE_ID             
 ,PARTY_ID                
 ,PARTY_SITE_ID           
 ,PERIOD_YEAR             
 ,PERIOD_NUM              
 ,AMOUNT                  
 ,GL_DATE                 
 ,EXCHANGE_RATE           
 ,EXCHANGE_DATE           
 ,CURRENCY_CODE           
 ,CONVERSION_TYPE         
 ,ACCOUNT_CLASS           
 ,HEADER_ID               
 ,ORDER_NUMBER            
 ,ORDER_LINE_ID           
 ,QUANTITY_INVOICED       
 ,DIST_TYPE               
 ,ELEMENT_TYPE            
 ,SEQUENCE_NUMBER         
 ,CCID                    
 ,SEGMENT1                
 ,SEGMENT2                
 ,SEGMENT3                
 ,SEGMENT4                
 ,SEGMENT5                
 ,SEGMENT6                
 ,SEGMENT7                
 ,SEGMENT8                
 ,SEGMENT9                
 ,SEGMENT10               
 ,DIST_BAL_TYPE           
 ,SOURCE_TABLE_NAME       
 ,JE_CATEGORY_NAME        
 ,JE_SOURCE_NAME          
 ,GL_POSTED_DATE          
 ,SOURCE_BATCH_NAME       
 ,SOURCE_BATCH_ID         
 ,DESTINATION_BATCH_NAME  
 ,DESTINATION_BATCH_ID    
 ,ERROR_MESSAGE           
 ,ERROR_FLAG              
 ,ERROR_CODE              
 ,CREATION_DATE           
 ,CREATED_BY              
 ,LAST_UPDATE_DATE        
 ,LAST_UPDATED_BY         
 ,LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN       
 ,REQUEST_ID              
 ,PROG_APPL_ID            
 ,PROG_ID                 
 ,PROGRAM_UPDATE_DATE     
 ,ATTRIBUTE1              
 ,ATTRIBUTE2              
 ,ATTRIBUTE3              
 ,ATTRIBUTE4              
 ,ATTRIBUTE5              
 ,ATTRIBUTE6              
 ,ATTRIBUTE7              
 ,ATTRIBUTE8              
 ,ATTRIBUTE9              
 ,ATTRIBUTE10             
 ,ATTRIBUTE11             
 ,ATTRIBUTE12             
 ,ATTRIBUTE13             
 ,ATTRIBUTE14             
 ,ATTRIBUTE15             
 ,ACCOUNTED_AMOUNT    
,PARENT_SUB_SKU_ID         
 ,ATTRIBUTE16             
 ,ATTRIBUTE17             
 ,ATTRIBUTE18             
 ,ATTRIBUTE19             
 ,ATTRIBUTE20             
 ,ATTRIBUTE21             
 ,ATTRIBUTE22             
 ,ATTRIBUTE23             
 ,ATTRIBUTE24             
 ,ATTRIBUTE25             
 ,ATTRIBUTE26             
 ,ATTRIBUTE27             
 ,ATTRIBUTE28             
 ,ATTRIBUTE29             
 ,ATTRIBUTE30             
 ,DATE_ATTRIBUTE31        
 ,DATE_ATTRIBUTE32        
 ,DATE_ATTRIBUTE33        
 ,DATE_ATTRIBUTE34        
 ,DATE_ATTRIBUTE35        
 ,NUM_ATTRIBUTE36         
 ,NUM_ATTRIBUTE37         
 ,NUM_ATTRIBUTE38         
 ,NUM_ATTRIBUTE39         
 ,NUM_ATTRIBUTE40         
 ,NUM_ATTRIBUTE41         
 ,NUM_ATTRIBUTE42         
 ,NUM_ATTRIBUTE43         
 ,NUM_ATTRIBUTE44         
 ,NUM_ATTRIBUTE45       
,TRAIL_FILE_NAME
,SOURCE_DML_TYPE
,SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME
,REFRESH_DATETIME
,PROCESSED_FLAG
 FROM 
 $$STGDB.ST_CG_XXCFIR_REVENUE_DIST_ALL   DIST 
 WHERE DIST .APPLICATION_ID IN
 (SELECT APPLICATION_ID FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_FND_APPLICATION_AR WHERE UPPER(APPLICATION_NAME) = 'CISCO NAT ADJUSTMENTS'
 AND LANG = 'US')  /* Adding new Application Name for Net Accounting*/
 AND  NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM  $$WORKDB.W_ROL_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRI W_ROL
        WHERE DIST.TRANSACTION_DIST_ID=W_ROL.SK_TRX_DISTRI_ID_INT )
